title: c00lgui
description: C00Lgui is a black paper item with a red outline and white label, letting you store teleport points. Shift + Right-click to add, Right-click to teleport with a 6-second charge and cooldown.
body: C00Lgui is a fully opaque black paper item with a red outline and white “c00lgui” label that lets you store and revisit custom teleport points. Shift + Right-click any solid block to add a new teleport point (no cooldown), then Right-click to initiate a 6-second charge before whisking you to your last placed point (35-second cooldown afterward). Moving during the charge cancels the teleport, and all teleports include safety checks and respect protected areas.
